title: Copy name and item link without text formatting

posts.author: jhunt (Josh Hunt)
posts.cookedHtml:
WHERE: Right click an item > “Copy name” OR “Copy item link”. Paste into email or word processing application.

CURRENT BEHAVIOR: The name or link are copied and pasted with formatting (font = Roboto, size = 11.5).

REQUEST: Copy only the raw text without formatting.

This sounds like a simple request to me. However, I am a software developer so I’m aware changes are rarely simple.
